itemListElement.reviewBody: What kind of school wants people to stand infront of main gate all night for admissions...Figure out way to accept all application and then lottery may be... Otherwise Admission is harassment.

Amazing school, teachers give particular attention to each student, and a student suffering from poor grades gets extra help too. School offers interhouse competitions as well as foreign exchange.School facilities are worth the price.
washrooms, corridors and classrooms are well maintained and hygienic.
All Teachers have great qualifications in their field.
students get to go to rural camps,night out camps, field trips which help them with certain subjects.

I am a student there and the school is gr8 because it is very big and the teachers are awesome👏😊. We also get to go to balewadi stadium for sports . It has classes from 1 to 12 standard. Fees are also good

Worst school don't fall for the name and fame..my kid is studying since nursery and till now not a single day he liked the school. Worst teacher specially maths teachers ,really don't know how they call themselves teachers,  Bad counseling will make your child more weak, Zero help if ur child is struggling in academics, only intelligent kids are engouraged , average kids are ignored and left   on their own and for parents to make and teach them at home.

There’s a reason why after I graduated half the teachers that taught me left their jobs.
The school shows incredibly poor management of its time, resources and the teaching is NOT worth the extravagant price.
Taking your children to this school almost indefinitely guarantees that they’re in company of super urban rich kids who bought their way into the school.
While some kids are truly gifted, they isolate themselves to be able to cope in the toxic environment that the school produces.
Being social exposes you to all sorts of bullying.
The staff and board of directors are so bad at managing their school despite of holding themselves at such high regard.
The schools IIT collaboration will also rob of of lacks of rupees as they trick you into shady contracts.
If you however still think these are minor concerns , the parking situation at the school on a daily basis will drive you mad.
The school also does very little to help your child if their suffering from mental illness since they often are the instigators of all sorts of stress, depression and anxiety. Even the counselor left school.
The class teachers barely speak English and waste all class time by not being able to manage the class. Then at the end of the academic year they will pressure you and jeopardize you by giving you insane assignments and lab work. Not one sentence of any physics or math teacher is legible however if you don’t understand class you will be forced to take tuition and that is definitely not what hard working parents are earning for. So now you’re paying more money.
At the end of the year your child has just traumatized her/his childhood by spending any time in the school.
Everyone in the school is underpaid, lazy and arrogant. If you want a degree in scamming people for money though forget about investing your child in the school, you might as well put yourself in this school and learn how to rob people off money.
I still don’t know what’s happened to all the money my dad worked to earn. I didn’t see any benefits and the teachers and definetly not  paid but the chairman drives many, many fancy cars.
Now I can’t afford fancy cars since I neither have money nor the valued education.
Anyways good luck!
